data.body:
Jira reconciler deep-dive (session "Jira reconciler"). METHOD: read rebar history (64 closed + 5 open Jira-sync bugs; ADRs 0004/0026-0031; docs/oss-comparison-and-remediation.md; reconciler commit log) + TWO independent subagents (A: cold code-level mechanism trace of the whole reconciler; B: OSS prior-art comparison). Both subagents converged with each other AND with my history reading.

VERDICT: The reconciler DESIGN is strong. Subagent B: it matches/beats every actively-maintained OSS peer (git-bug bridges, Sync2Jira, canonical/gh-jira-sync-bot, coreos/issue-sync, redmine_bridge, GitLab-Jira) and lands in the COMMERCIAL tier (Exalate/Unito/K15t Backbone) on the hard gotchas; TWO mechanisms have no peer in EITHER tier: the blast-radius circuit breaker (max_acting_fraction 0.10, classify.py:305-336) and the per-pass identity self-audit/quarantine (invariants.py:239-302). Chronic issues are NOT design flaws -> they are (a) a long tail of impl bugs in a genuinely hard space (mostly fixed: 64 closed), plus (b) ONE structural gap: the convergence redesign LANDED (epic file-lens-jewel closed) but is NOT fully live.

DON'T-REGRESS (deliberate correct designs, ADR+bug-backed; treating any as a defect reintroduces a known failure): tombstone-not-hard-delete + bounded-GET-404-with-grace + reversible retirement to bindings-retired.json (ADR 0027/0028); local-wins-on-absent-baseline degrade + fail-closed-on-corrupt-baseline (ADR 0026); 3-way baseline merge for 5 mirrored scalars title/description/priority/status/assignee; provenance echo marker <!-- rebar:reconciler-echo --> + most-recent-only ProvenanceLedger + same-pass inbound/outbound suppression (ADR 0029); poll-only 20-min cadence; Epic-only parent projection; assignee->unassigned convergence; 429/Retry-After + exp-backoff + jitter; no-blind-retry-on-timeout for non-idempotent writes (AcliTimeoutError not a TimeoutError); per-mutation failure isolation fail-loud-at-end; ref-lock lease+heartbeat+fence (ADR 0031); graduated bootstrap-throttle rollout caps.

KEY RISKS / OPEN ITEMS:
1. STRUCTURAL (biggest) - half-migrated 3-way baseline. LIVE arbiter still reads whole-Jira prev_snapshot; the per-binding baseline meant to enable per-field arbitration is dual-write SHADOW with no consumer (reconcile.py:1041-1066). Phase-3 consumer swap deferred behind a live-ops gate = OPEN ticket lofty-beech-twang. Two arbiters encode the same rule twice (outbound_fields._local_matches_prev vs classify.classify). Net: per-field churn reduction not fully live.
2. SILENT DATA LOSS (scenario A) - concurrent same-field edit on the 5 mirrored scalars resolves local-wins with NO conflict record/comment; absent baseline widens the clobber window.
3. LATENT BUG - hard-delete -> Jira re-create is UNREACHABLE (probe_outcome vs reason key mismatch, apply_inbound.py:541-560) yet posts a COMMENT claiming it fired; delete_one docstring says 'transition to Closed' but code hard-deletes (dispatch_one.py:49-68). Ticket exists: lowerclass-creased-fruitbat (open).
4. LATENT - silent outbound field-allowlist drop (apply_outbound.py:117-124): fields outside the update allowlist dropped with NO alert (unlike unmapped-status, which alerts). Both subagents flagged this independently. ~1-line fix. No ticket yet.
5. SHARED GAP (with git-bug) - single-hop status transitions only (acli.py:514-528); a multi-hop Jira workflow -> per-mutation failure (not a pass abort).
6. Coarser 429 handling on the ACLI-subprocess bulk path vs the REST path (no Retry-After parse).

CROSS-LINK to the other thread this session: store-corruption epic adept-hedge-stain / bug saggy-pupil-plant RC1 (~2400 SNAPSHOT_INCONSISTENT) was CAUSED by the reconciler CI workflow (shallow --depth=1 fetch + git rebase origin/tickets). Fixed (#1, commit 5a7548a) but live-store remediation (WS5) still pending; current fsck still 2422 SNAPSHOT_INCONSISTENT + 11 ORPHAN_EVENT + 1 MISSING_CREATE.

CLARIFICATION: 'INDETERMINATE' is NOT a reconciler concept (LLM review/verify kernel only); reconcile makes no LLM calls. jira-reb-687 (INDETERMINATE handling) is about the LLM gates, not the reconcile pass.

DELIBERATE SCOPE GAPS (not regressions): comment edits/deletes not propagated; attachments not synced; no general custom-field engine; hierarchy beyond Epic->child flattened in Jira.
